titlStmt.titl: DDI description: Decision on Final Disposal of Nuclear Waste 2001

holdings.location: Finnish Social Science Data Archive FSD

docDscr.notes: FSD:n aineistokuvailut (FSD metadata records), joiden tekijä on Suomen yhteiskuntatieteellinen tietoarkisto (Finnish Social Science Data Archive), on lisensoitu Creative Commons 1.0 Yleismaailmallinen (CC0 1.0) -lisenssillä.

titlStmt.titl: Decision on Final Disposal of Nuclear Waste 2001

AuthEnty.affiliation: University of Tampere. Department of Political Science and International Relations

prodStmt.copyright: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.

serInfo.p: Individual datasets that do not belong to any series.

citation.biblCit: Suominen, Petteri (University of Tampere): Decision on Final Disposal of Nuclear Waste 2001 [dataset]. Data version 1.0 (2003-05-08). Finnish Social Science Data Archive [distributor]. DOI: https://doi.org/10.60686/t-fsd1249; URN: https://urn.fi/urn:nbn:fi:fsd:T-FSD1249

holdings.location: Finnish Social Science Data Archive FSD

abstract.p: The data consist of documents and parliamentary discussions related to the 2001 decision on building the final disposal facility of nuclear waste, which preceded the decision to build the fifth nuclear power plant in Finland. The archived data contain various documents, records, applications, decisions, plans, reports, and parliamentary discussions related to the decision-making process.
The dataset is only available in Finnish.

sumDscr.universe: The 2000 and 2001 documents and parliamentary discussions related to the decision on building the final disposal facility of nuclear waste in Finland.

dataCollector.affiliation: University of Tampere. Department of Political Science and International Relations

sampProc.p: The researcher collected an aggregate of documents based on which it was possible to make an argument analysis of the decision-making process on the final disposal of nuclear waste.

dataColl.resInstru: Data collection guidelines: Secondary data collection guide DataCollectionGuidelines.SecondaryDataCollectionGuide

method.stdyClas: Detailed and specific data description in Finnish and English. The data are checked and processed in detail. If necessary, the data are anonymised.

useStmt.restrctn: The dataset is (A) openly available for all users without registration (CC BY 4.0).
useStmt.citReq: The data and its creators shall be cited in all publications and presentations for which the data have been used. The bibliographic citation may be in the form suggested by the archive or in the form required by the publication.
useStmt.deposReq: Notify FSD of all publications where you have used the data by sending the citation information to user-services.fsd@tuni.fi.
useStmt.disclaimer: The original data creators and the archive bear no responsibility for any results or interpretations arising from the reuse of the data.

othrStdyMat.relPubl:
Raittila, Pentti & Suominen, Petteri (2002): Keskustelu ydinjätteen loppusijoitusta koskevasta periaatepäätöksestä eduskunnassa ja mediassa. Teoksessa Raittila, Hokkanen, Kojo & Litmanen (toim): Ydinjäteihme suomalaisittain. Tampere University Press.
Keskustelu ydinjätteen loppusijoitusta koskevasta periaatepäätöksestä eduskunnassa ja mediassa

Suominen, Petteri (2002). Eduskunta jätteen ytimessä. Ydinjätteen loppusijoitusta koskevan eduskuntakäsittelyn argumentointianalyysia. JYT2001 tutkimuksia. Tampere: Tampereen yliopisto. Politiikan tutkimuksen laitos. Työraportti; 1/2002.
Eduskunta jätteen ytimessä. Ydinjätteen loppusijoitusta koskevan eduskuntakäsittelyn argumentointianalyysia
